items.title: Widow, 86, back in France after being held by ICE
items.dek: Marie-Thérèse had moved to the US after reuniting with her long-lost love, an American man who died in January.
items.body: Marie-Thérèse had moved to the US after reuniting with her long-lost love, an American man who died in January.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Irish fugitive and suspected crime boss Daniel Kinahan arrested in Dubai
items.dek: Kinahan, in his 40s, was arrested in Dubai on foot of an arrest warrant issued by the Irish courts.
items.body: Kinahan, in his 40s, was arrested in Dubai on foot of an arrest warrant issued by the Irish courts.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: What next for South African opposition firebrand Malema after his five-year prison sentence?
items.dek: The sentence raises huge questions marks over the political future of one of South Africa's most controversial politicians.
items.body: The sentence raises huge questions marks over the political future of one of South Africa's most controversial politicians.
